hero.label: About checkauto.lt
hero.title: Independent. Objective. On your side.
hero.subtitle: Professional car inspection service in Lithuania. Independent, objective, on your side.

intro.p1: We are an independent car inspection service operating across Lithuania: Kaunas, Vilnius, Klaipėda, Šiauliai, Panevėžys and beyond. No partnerships with dealerships, sellers, or other platforms. Our only interest is making sure you don't pay for someone else's problems.
intro.p2: In every inspection, we uncover what the seller keeps quiet about: tampered mileage, hidden accident traces, cleared OBD error codes. We inspect all brands. The goal is simple – to help you make purchase decisions based on facts.
intro.p3: We work without any rush, following a clear methodology. Every car is evaluated as if we were buying it ourselves.

values.label: Principles
values.heading: The foundation of every inspection
values.v1_text: No partnerships with dealerships or sellers. The assessment is objective and unbiased.
values.v2_text: The report is clear and understandable. No hidden lines or ambiguous wording.
values.v3_text: Every inspection follows an established methodology. No compromises on time.

about.quote: Every car is evaluated as if we were buying it ourselves.

philosophy.quote: Every car is evaluated as if we were buying it ourselves.
philosophy.author: — the checkauto.lt team
philosophy.context: This isn't a slogan, it's a working principle. Every inspection is performed without compromise, so your decision is based on facts.

cta.title: An inspection you can trust
cta.text: Get in touch, and there will be no need to guess about the vehicle's condition.
